data.description:
## Summary

The environment-aware `resolve_symbol` grounding tool (`pai_tools.grounding_tools`,
bug 406f) classifies a resolved symbol as `repo-local` vs `third-party/stdlib` by
root-containment alone (`_within_root(origin, root)` at `src/rebar/llm/pai_tools.py`).
When the virtualenv lives INSIDE the repo (`<repo>/.venv/.../site-packages/<pkg>`),
a third-party dependency's origin path is under the repo root, so it is wrongly
labelled `repo-local` ÔÇö defeating the tool's whole purpose of separating first-party
symbols from installed dependencies.

The discovery tools already avoid this (their `skip_dir` prunes `.venv`/`venv` via
`_NOISE_DIRS`), but the `resolve_symbol` locality check had no equivalent exclusion.

## Reproduction Steps

1. Have a repo-nested virtualenv (`<repo>/.venv`) with a third-party dep installed
   (e.g. PyYAML).
2. Call `grounding_tools(".")`'s `resolve_symbol("yaml")`.

- Expected: `EXISTS: ÔÇª [third-party/stdlib (site-packages), origin=ÔÇª]`.
- Actual: `EXISTS: ÔÇª [repo-local, origin=ÔÇª]` ÔÇö the in-tree `.venv` origin is under
  the root, so it is misclassified as first-party source.

## Root Cause

`resolve_symbol` computes locality as `_within_root(realpath(origin), root)` only.
A repo-nested `.venv`/site-packages path satisfies `_within_root`, so third-party
deps installed in-tree read as `repo-local`.

## Fix

- Add `_is_dependency_path()` (+ `_DEPENDENCY_PATH_PARTS`) to `src/rebar/llm/fs_tools.py`
  detecting `site-packages`/`dist-packages`/`.venv`/`venv` path components.
- Gate the classification in `src/rebar/llm/pai_tools.py`: `repo-local` requires
  under-root AND not a dependency path.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `resolve_symbol` classifies a dependency installed in a repo-nested `.venv`
      (origin under `<repo>/.venv/.../site-packages/ÔÇª`) as `third-party/stdlib`, not
      `repo-local`.
- [ ] Genuine first-party source under the root (e.g. `src/rebar/ÔÇª`, not in a
      dependency root) still classifies as `repo-local` (no over-exclusion).
- [ ] `_is_dependency_path` in `src/rebar/llm/fs_tools.py` flags
      `site-packages`/`dist-packages`/`.venv`/`venv` path components.
- [ ] Regression tests cover the in-tree-`.venv` case and the first-party `src/` case.
- [ ] `make lint`, `make typecheck`, and the affected unit tests pass.
data.title: resolve_symbol misclassifies repo-nested .venv deps as repo-local
